<!--
  Thanks for contributing to Hector ORM!
  All pull requests must target the monorepo (hectororm/hectororm).
  The per-package repositories are read-only mirrors and do not accept PRs.
-->

## Description

<!-- A clear and concise description of what this PR changes and why. -->

## Type of change

<!-- Put an "x" in the boxes that apply. -->

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Refactor / internal change (no functional change)

## Related package(s)

<!-- Put an "x" next to each affected package. -->

- [ ] hectororm/collection
- [ ] hectororm/connection
- [ ] hectororm/data-types
- [ ] hectororm/migration
- [ ] hectororm/orm
- [ ] hectororm/pagination
- [ ] hectororm/query
- [ ] hectororm/schema

## Related issue

<!-- Link the issue this PR addresses, e.g. "Fixes #123". -->

Fixes #

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated for the change, and `vendor/bin/phpunit` passes
- [ ] `vendor/bin/rector` has been run and any resulting changes are committed
- [ ] The `[Unreleased]` section of the relevant `src/<Package>/CHANGELOG.md` is updated
- [ ] Code follows the project style (`declare(strict_types=1)`, PSR-12, Yoda conditions, guard clauses)
- [ ] This PR targets the monorepo, not a read-only mirror
